la cumparsita|gerardo matos rodriguez.es:
Si supieras que aun dentro de mi alma
Conservo aquel cariño
Que tuve para ti...
Quién sabe si supieras
Que nunca te he olvidado
Volviendo a tu pasado
Te acordarás de mí.
la cumparsita|gerardo matos rodriguez.en:
If you knew that still within my soul
I keep that affection
That I had for you...
Who knows if you knew
That I have never forgotten you
Returning to your past
You will remember me.
